title: make error V3Randomize
body:
Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)
see below

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?
> git clone https://github.com/verilator/verilator
>  cd verilator
> git checkout stable
> 

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
latest stable

What OS and distribution are you using?
Linux Rocky-8-latest-amd64-base 4.18.0-477.27.1.el8_8.x86_64

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
yes

```
../V3Randomize.cpp:1269:21: note:   no known conversion for argument 1 from ?<brace-enclosed initializer list>? to ?RandomizeMode?
In file included from ../V3PchAstNoMT.h:29:
../V3Randomize.cpp:1262:88: error: no matching function for call to ?RandomizeVisitor::wrapIfMode(<brace-enclosed initializer list>, AstVar*, AstNodeStmt*&)?
         return VN_AS(wrapIfMode({.asInt = varp->user1()}, getRandModeVar(classp), stmtp),
                                                                                        ^
../V3Ast.h:81:92: note: in definition of macro ?VN_AS?
 #define VN_AS(nodep, nodetypename) (AstNode::privateAs<Ast##nodetypename, decltype(nodep)>(nodep))
                                                                                            ^~~~~
../V3Randomize.cpp:1269:21: note: candidate: ?static AstNode* RandomizeVisitor::wrapIfMode(RandomizeMode, AstVar*, AstNode*)?
     static AstNode* wrapIfMode(const RandomizeMode mode, AstVar* modeVarp, AstNode* stmtp) {
                     ^~~~~~~~~~
../V3Randomize.cpp:1269:21: note:   no known conversion for argument 1 from ?<brace-enclosed initializer list>? to ?RandomizeMode?
../V3Randomize.cpp: In static member function ?static AstNode* RandomizeVisitor::wrapIfConstraintMode(AstClass*, AstConstraint*, AstNode*)?:
../V3Randomize.cpp:1267:91: error: no matching function for call to ?RandomizeVisitor::wrapIfMode(<brace-enclosed initializer list>, AstVar*, AstNode*&)?
         return wrapIfMode({.asInt = constrp->user1()}, getConstraintModeVar(classp), stmtp);
                                                                                           ^
../V3Randomize.cpp:1269:21: note: candidate: ?static AstNode* RandomizeVisitor::wrapIfMode(RandomizeMode, AstVar*, AstNode*)?
     static AstNode* wrapIfMode(const RandomizeMode mode, AstVar* modeVarp, AstNode* stmtp) {
                     ^~~~~~~~~~
../V3Randomize.cpp:1269:21: note:   no known conversion for argument 1 from ?<brace-enclosed initializer list>? to ?RandomizeMode?
make[2]: *** [../Makefile_obj:401: V3Randomize.o] Error 1
make[2]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
make[2]: Leaving directory '/tools/downloads/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make[1]: *** [Makefile:85: ../bin/verilator_bin_dbg] Error 2
make[1]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
make[2]: Leaving directory '/tools/downloads/verilator/src/obj_opt'
make[1]: *** [Makefile:79: ../bin/verilator_bin] Error 2
make[1]: Leaving directory '/tools/downloads/verilator/src'
make: *** [Makefile:147: verilator_exe] Error 2
```
